movie.title: Batman Ninja vs. Yakuza League (2025) [ENG & JAP] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive | ESub
movie.synopsis: Batman Ninja vs Yakuza League (2025) The Batman family has returned to the present to discover that Japan has disappeared, and a giant island – Hinomoto – is now in the sky over Gotham City. At the top sit the Yakuza, a group of superpowered individuals who reign without honor or humanity and look suspiciously like the Justice League. Now, it’s up to Batman and his allies to save Gotham!
genres: DC, Marvel or Other Superhero Movies & TV Series
